evidence.summary: T00-T12 result JSON files exist, parse, match task_pack_id shopops-goal-2026-06-03, and include terminal statuses.
T00-T12 task log evidence exists, including codex worker logs.
Live Feishu Bitable write/upsert/readback is unavailable because credentials/table IDs or lark_oapi are missing.
Live Qianniu PC/CDP order and promotion-center collection cannot be verified from this surface.
Final gate report explains why pure PASS is not allowed.

blockers.summary: Missing live Feishu Bitable evidence: T03 and T11 show required Feishu credentials/table IDs and lark_oapi are unavailable, so real write/upsert/readback cannot be verified.
Missing live Qianniu evidence: T04, T06, T07, T08, T10, and T11 show no usable live Qianniu PC/CDP session evidence from this surface.
Local-only storage, crawler, scheduler, and regression evidence cannot be represented as live Feishu/Qianniu PASS evidence.
